2606.18122.title: Embedded Machine Learning for Microcontroller-Class Edge Devices: Data, Feature, Evaluation, and Deployment Pipelines
2606.18122.paper_summary: Embedded machine learning moves inference from cloud services to resource-constrained devices that must acquire data, preprocess signals, run a model, and act within tight limits on memory, energy, and latency. This paper presents a systems-oriented synthesis of an embedded machine-learning workflow for microcontroller-class platforms. The emphasis is placed on engineering decisions that are often hidden in generic machine-learning introductions: sampling and buffering, feature extraction as dimensionality reduction, validation under class imbalance, model/runtime co-design, and streaming deployment. Two representative signal families are used throughout the paper. The first is inertial motion recognition, where a two-second, three-axis accelerometer window is transformed from raw samples into root-mean-square and spectral features before classification. The second is keyword spotting, where audio is sampled, anti-aliased, transformed into mel-frequency cepstral coefficients, and processed by a compact one-dimensional convolutional network. The paper concludes with practical design rules for robust on-device inference, including data curation, quantization, thresholding, scheduling, and field monitoring.
2606.18122.paper_summary_zh: 嵌入式機器學習將推斷從雲端服務移至資源受限的設備，這些設備必須獲取數據、預處理信號、運行模型，並在內存、能量和延遲的緊限制約內執行操作。<lb/>本文提出了一個針對微控制器級平台的嵌入式機器學習工作流程的系統導向綜合。<lb/>重點放在那些通常隱藏在通用機器學習介紹中的工程決策上：採樣和緩衝、作為降維的特徵提取、在類別不平衡下的驗證、模型/運行時共同設計，以及流式部署。<lb/>整篇論文使用了兩個代表性的信號系列。<lb/>第一個是慣性運動識別，其中一個兩秒的三軸加速度計窗口從原始樣本轉換為均方根和頻譜特徵，然後進行分類。<lb/>第二個是關鍵字識別，其中音頻被採樣、抗混疊、轉換為梅爾頻率倒譜係數，並由一個緊湊的一維卷積網絡處理。<lb/>本文以針對穩健的設備內推斷的實用設計規則作結，包括數據策劃、量化、閾值設定、排程和現場監控。
2606.18122.author: Mostafa Darvishi et.al.
